help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Guides and useful information about the system
help.cat_dashboard_overview: The dashboard is the main screen of the system. Here you can see a quick overview of your activity, including the number of daily visits, pending transcriptions, total registered patients, and a weekly visits chart. The dashboard updates automatically and always displays the most up-to-date information.
help.cat_dashboard_step1: Log in to the system - the dashboard loads automatically as the home screen
help.cat_dashboard_step2: View the statistics cards at the top - visits today, pending transcriptions, total patients, and visits this week
help.cat_dashboard_step3: Check the weekly visits chart to identify trends in clinic activity
help.cat_dashboard_step4: Use the treatment timer to manage time with the patient
help.cat_dashboard_step5: Click on active statistics cards to navigate directly to relevant screens
help.cat_dashboard_tip1: Clicking on "Visits Today" will take you directly to the appointments calendar
help.cat_dashboard_tip2: Clicking on "Total Patients" will open the patient list
help.cat_dashboard_tip3: The chart shows the last seven days - use it to identify busy days
help.cat_patients_overview: The patient management screen allows you to manage all your patients in one place. You can create new patient cards, edit existing details, view visit history, and search for patients by name, phone number, or national ID.
help.cat_patients_step1: Navigate to the "Patients" screen via the side menu
help.cat_patients_step2: Click "New Patient" to create a patient card - fill in name, phone, date of birth, and allergies
help.cat_patients_step3: Use the search bar to find an existing patient by name, phone, or ID
help.cat_patients_step4: Click on a patient card to view the full profile, including visit history and attached files
help.cat_patients_step5: In the patient profile, click "Edit" to update details
help.cat_patients_tip1: Mark allergies on the patient card - they will be displayed as a warning on all system screens
help.cat_patients_tip2: You can upload files (documents, photos) to the patient profile
help.cat_patients_tip3: Search is performed in real-time - results update as you type
help.cat_recording_desc: How to record and understand the transcription process
help.cat_recording_overview: The recording module allows you to record medical visits directly from the browser. After recording, the system automatically transcribes using Whisper AI, creates a smart summary, and tags the visit. The entire process happens in the background and updates in real-time.
help.cat_recording_step1: Navigate to the "Recording" screen via the side menu
help.cat_recording_step2: Search for and select the relevant patient for the visit
help.cat_recording_step3: Click the red record button to start - ensure the microphone is approved in the browser
help.cat_recording_step4: Speak naturally - the system supports Hebrew and Arabic
help.cat_recording_step5: Click "Stop" to end the recording - the file will be uploaded automatically
help.cat_recording_step6: Wait for automatic transcription and summary - you'll receive an update when the process is complete
help.cat_recording_tip1: Make sure you're in a quiet environment for more accurate transcription
help.cat_recording_tip2: The recording is sent in chunks - even if you disconnect, what was sent is already saved
help.cat_recording_tip3: You can use the treatment timer in parallel with recording for time management
help.cat_recording_tip4: Support for recordings up to 60 minutes in a row
help.cat_summary_desc: Understanding AI summaries, editing and approval
help.cat_summary_overview: The visit summary screen displays the summary automatically created by the artificial intelligence engine. The summary includes chief complaint, findings, diagnoses (with ICD codes), treatment plan, and recommendations. You can edit any field and adjust the summary before final saving.
help.cat_summary_step1: After successful transcription, the summary is created automatically - access it via the patient profile
help.cat_summary_step2: Review the summary: chief complaint, findings, diagnoses, treatment plan, and recommendations
help.cat_summary_step3: Check the urgency level set - low, medium, high, or critical
help.cat_summary_step4: Click "Edit" to correct or complete details in the summary
help.cat_summary_step5: After editing, click "Save" to save changes
help.cat_summary_tip1: The summary is a starting point - always check and correct before approval
help.cat_summary_tip2: ICD codes are automatically attached to diagnoses - you can update them
help.cat_summary_tip3: You can create a manual summary even without recording via the "Manual Summary" screen
help.cat_search_overview: The search engine allows you to find information in summaries and transcriptions quickly and accurately. You can search by free text, filter by tags (diagnoses, medications, symptoms), and limit to a date range. Results are displayed in real-time as you type.
help.cat_search_step1: Navigate to the "Search" screen via the side menu
help.cat_search_step2: Type keywords in the search field - for example: "back pain", "diabetes", "antibiotic"
help.cat_search_step3: Use tags for targeted filtering - click on a tag to add/remove it
help.cat_search_step4: Set a date range to narrow results to a specific period
help.cat_search_step5: Click on a result to view the full summary or transcription
help.cat_search_tip1: You can combine free text with tags and dates for precise search
help.cat_search_tip2: Click "Clear tags" to reset all filters
help.cat_search_tip3: Results are displayed by relevance - the most matching results are shown first
help.cat_editing_overview: The system allows editing of any field in the visit summary, correcting transcriptions, and updating patient details. Every change is saved and recorded in the audit log for full transparency. You can also create manual summaries without recording.
help.cat_editing_step1: Open the summary or transcription you want to edit
help.cat_editing_step2: Click the "Edit" button in the top corner
help.cat_editing_step3: Edit the relevant fields - complaint, findings, diagnoses, treatment, recommendations
help.cat_editing_step5: Changes are automatically recorded in the audit log
help.cat_editing_tip1: Every edit is saved immediately after clicking "Save"
help.cat_editing_tip2: Change history is available in the audit log in the admin panel
help.cat_editing_tip3: You can edit summaries even after time - there's no time limit for editing
help.cat_settings_overview: The settings screen allows you to customize the system to your personal taste. You can choose between three color schemes (Aurora, Ember, Ocean), set display preferences, and manage your profile details.
help.cat_settings_step1: Navigate to the "Settings" screen via the side menu
help.cat_settings_step2: View your profile details - name, email, and photo
help.cat_settings_step3: Choose your preferred color scheme: Aurora (neon), Ember (warm), or Ocean (clean)
help.cat_settings_step4: Set display preferences and patient identification key
help.cat_settings_step5: Changes take effect immediately on all screens
help.cat_settings_tip1: The color scheme is saved between logins - no need to reconfigure
help.cat_settings_tip2: Each color scheme is adapted for prolonged work and prevents eye fatigue
help.cat_settings_tip3: You can change the color scheme at any time without affecting the data
help.cat_admin_desc: User management, audit log and reports
help.cat_admin_overview: The admin panel is available to system administrators only. Here you can manage users, view the audit log, track system activity, and generate reports. Every administrative action is automatically recorded.
help.cat_admin_step1: Navigate to "Admin" via the side menu (available to administrators only)
help.cat_admin_step2: User management - view user list, change roles (doctor/admin/reception), and enable/disable accounts
help.cat_admin_step3: Audit log - view all actions performed in the system including time, user, and IP address
help.cat_admin_step4: Activity tracking - follow system usage in real-time
help.cat_admin_step5: Reports - generate statistical reports on clinic activity
help.cat_admin_tip1: Only users with "Admin" permission can access the admin panel
help.cat_admin_tip2: The audit log maintains full history - records cannot be deleted
help.cat_admin_tip3: Use reports to identify trends and improve work processes
